file_insights.purpose: Rate limiting middleware implementation using Redis-backed sliding window algorithm

patterns_discovered.description: createRateLimiter factory function accepts RateLimitOptions to create customizable rate limiting middleware
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows flexible rate limit configurations for different endpoints and use cases

patterns_discovered.description: RATE_LIMIT_DEFAULTS object provides pre-configured tiers (public, authenticated, webhook, custom) matching CONSTRAINTS.md specifications
patterns_discovered.benefit: Standardizes rate limiting across the application with consistent limits

patterns_discovered.description: Pluggable key generators (generateIpKey, generateUserKey, generateOrgKey, generateEndpointKey) allow different rate limiting scopes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Supports rate limiting by IP, user ID, organization, or endpoint path

patterns_discovered.description: rateLimiterCache Map stores RateLimiterRedis instances by cache key to avoid recreating limiters
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves performance by reusing limiter instances for identical configurations

patterns_discovered.description: Catch-all error handling that allows requests through if rate limiting fails, preventing traffic blockage
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures rate limiting issues don't cascade into application downtime

patterns_discovered.description: setRateLimitHeaders function attaches rate limit info to response headers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides clients with rate limit status information for client-side handling

patterns_discovered.description: Helper functions (createStrictRateLimiter, createUploadRateLimiter, createAIRateLimiter) for common use cases
patterns_discovered.benefit: Provides convenient pre-configured limiters for sensitive operations and resource-intensive endpoints

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Fallback IP resolution requires careful proxy header handling
gotchas_discovered.details: generateIpKey checks x-forwarded-for header and handles both string and array formats. If header is missing, falls back to req.ip or req.socket.remoteAddress
gotchas_discovered.impact: Rate limiting by IP may be inaccurate behind load balancers without proper configuration
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure proxy headers are properly configured in Express (trust proxy setting)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: UUID normalization in endpoint key generation
gotchas_discovered.details: generateEndpointKey replaces UUIDs with ':id' placeholder using regex pattern /[a-f0-9-]{36}/gi to prevent unique keys per resource
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without normalization, each UUID would create separate rate limit bucket, defeating per-endpoint limiting
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Pattern matches standard UUID format but may miss edge cases

gotchas_discovered.details: Rate limiting relies on Redis connection. If Redis is unavailable, requests are allowed through
gotchas_discovered.impact: Rate limits are not enforced during Redis outages, potentially allowing abuse
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implemented insurance limiter fallback (undefined uses memory), but not fully configured

gotchas_discovered.details: generateUserKey and generateOrgKey fall back to IP-based limiting if user/organization not authenticated
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unauthenticated users might share IP-based rate limit buckets, affecting legitimate users behind NATs/proxies
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Behavior is documented but may cause unexpected limits for users behind corporate proxies

gotchas_discovered.details: Webhook tier has blockDuration: 60 while other tiers have blockDuration: 0, indicating memory-based blocking
gotchas_discovered.impact: In-memory blocking only works within single process; distributed systems need Redis persistence
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: blockDuration parameter documented but requires clarification on inmemoryBlockOnConsumed behavior

features_implemented: Redis-backed sliding window rate limiting algorithm
Configurable rate limit tiers (public: 60/min, authenticated: 300/min, webhook: 10/min)
Multiple key generation strategies for different rate limit scopes
Rate limit info attachment to request and response headers
Custom handler support for exceeded limits
Specialized limiters for sensitive operations (login, uploads, AI)
Skip condition support to exclude specific requests
approach_outcome.alignment_with_specs: Fully implements CONSTRAINTS.md section 2.4 rate limiting specifications
approach_outcome.code_quality: Production-ready with comprehensive documentation and examples

recommendations.recommendation: Configure Redis insurance limiter with in-memory fallback for high availability
recommendations.rationale: Currently undefined; should specify insurance limiter to maintain rate limiting if Redis fails
recommendations.implementation: Add insuranceLimiter configuration with memory-based RateLimiterMemory instance

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive unit tests for all key generators and middleware configurations
recommendations.rationale: Rate limiting is critical security component requiring thorough test coverage for edge cases
recommendations.implementation: Tests for IP resolution, UUID normalization, fallback behavior, Redis failures, header setting

recommendations.recommendation: Add rate limiting configuration guide to project documentation
recommendations.rationale: Multiple configuration options and key generators may be confusing for new developers
recommendations.implementation: Document use cases for each preset tier and key generator, provide integration examples

recommendations.recommendation: Add metrics/logging for rate limit exceeded events
recommendations.rationale: No visibility into when rate limits are triggered or patterns of abuse
recommendations.implementation: Log rate limit violations, expose metrics for monitoring dashboards

recommendations.recommendation: Verify rate limiter cache effectiveness with metrics collection
recommendations.rationale: Cache reuse depends on identical configuration parameters; verify actual hit rate
recommendations.implementation: Add cache hit/miss metrics to monitor caching efficiency

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding distributed rate limiting with Redis Cluster support
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation assumes single Redis instance; may not handle distributed systems well
recommendations.implementation: Support for Redis Cluster configuration and cross-instance coordination

recommendations.recommendation: Add support for dynamic rate limit adjustment based on system load
recommendations.rationale: Fixed limits may not adapt to varying traffic patterns or resource constraints
recommendations.implementation: Integration with system metrics to adjust rate limits dynamically
